infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Student Management to use the camera for student face verification and supervisor photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Student Management to access your photos to upload supervisor pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Student Management to save photos when needed.
